name: vtex-se-toolkit
description: Skills for the VTEX Solution Engineering team to run on their Rocketlane pre-sales opportunities: weekly status reports, pipeline/portfolio triage, discovery & solution-design briefs, POC/demo readiness checks, logging English notes back to Rocketlane, an interactive status board to bulk-update project statuses, and turning Granola/Read AI meetings into Rocketlane notes. Cross-references Rocketlane data with Slack project channels (reconciling the two), the live VTEX account configuration, the Atlas architecture knowledge base, and meeting notes from Granola or Read AI. Read-only by default; the log-note, status-board, and meeting-to-rocketlane skills write to Rocketlane only after explicit confirmation.
